notes: Assistant-drafted seed labels for SQLMesh website retrieval experiments. Use for cross-site calibration only until reviewed.

cases.question: Where does SQLMesh document state, default, and test connections plus default gateway configuration?

judgments.reason: Connections guide covers state connection, default connection, test connection, default gateway, and supported engines.
Configuration reference is adjacent to connection configuration.

cases.question: Which SQLMesh guide explains the built-in scheduler for running models on a cadence?

judgments.reason: Scheduling guide contains the built-in scheduler section.
Configuration reference may describe scheduler settings.

cases.question: Where are SQLMesh model unit tests and testing changes to models documented?

judgments.reason: Testing guide documents testing changes to models and model test structure.
Testing concept page is closely related conceptual material.

cases.question: Where does SQLMesh explain audits such as row counts, null value checks, generic audits, and inline audits?

judgments.reason: Auditing page covers generic audits, inline audits, row counts, NULL value audits, and plan vs run behavior.
Testing guide is adjacent quality-validation documentation.

cases.question: Where are SQLMesh model kinds, materialization strategies, incremental models, and SCD Type 2 model options documented?

judgments.reason: Model kinds page covers materialization strategies, incremental kinds, and SCD Type 2 by time/column.
Incremental by time guide is related to incremental model behavior.

cases.question: Which SQLMesh page documents macro operators like @EACH, @IF, @EVAL, @FILTER, @REDUCE, and @STAR?

judgments.reason: SQLMesh macros page lists macro operators including @EACH, @IF, @EVAL, @FILTER, @REDUCE, and @STAR.
Macros overview is adjacent conceptual material.

cases.question: Where does SQLMesh define metrics with automatic joins, derived metrics, expressions, owners, and dialects?

judgments.reason: Metrics definition page covers automatic joins, derived metrics, name, expression, description, owner, and dialect fields.
Metrics overview is closely related context.

cases.question: Where is the SQLMesh GitHub Actions CI/CD bot documented, including required approval and deploy command signals?

judgments.reason: GitHub Actions CI/CD Bot page covers required approval signal/configuration and deploy command signal/configuration.

cases.question: Where are SQLMesh DuckDB connection options, catalogs, DuckLake catalog examples, secrets, and filesystem configuration documented?

judgments.reason: DuckDB integration page covers connection options, catalogs, DuckLake catalog example, secrets, and filesystem configuration.
Connections guide is broadly related to engine connection configuration.

cases.question: Which SQLMesh reference page documents CLI commands including export and import?

judgments.reason: CLI reference page includes export and import command sections.
CLI quickstart is related but not the command reference.
